features: Africa Anti-perspirant Deodorant Stick keeps you cool no matter what, with an exotic scent of warm African spices and aromas
Lynx anti-perspirant stick gives you 48 hours of protection, guaranteeing dryness no matter what comes your way
An anti-perspirant deodorant stick for all-day freshness and confidence
Pro-scent technology with an anti-sweat formula means this stick deodorant effectively combats wetness
In recyclable packaging – fresher you, cleaner planet
description: Product Description You never know what's around the corner. Or who. Featuring an exotic mix of African spices and aromas, Lynx Africa Anti-perspirant Deodorant Stick gives you 48 hours of odour protection with revolutionary dual-action pro-scent technology, keeping you smelling awesome and feeling chill, all day. You never know when opportunity will strike, so you need a strong deodorant that’s going to keep you smelling iconic and feeling confident no matter the circumstances. With 48-hour anti-sweat protection, Lynx Africa Anti-perspirant Deodorant Stick guarantees long-lasting underarm dryness. So, no matter who comes your way, you can rest easy knowing you're 100% ready. Plus, you get that iconic scent for that 100% fresh 90s feel. How to use it? Turn the dial to raise the stick and apply a thin layer to your underarms to make the most of 48 hours of guaranteed freshness and an irresistible smell. Ingredients Aluminum Zirconium Tetrachlorohydrex GLY, Isopropyl Palmitate, Stearyl Alcohol, Cyclopentasiloxane, PPG-14 Butyl Ether, Paraffinum Liquidum, Talc, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Parfum, Steareth-100, BHT, Benzyl Alcohol, Benzyl Salicylate, Coumarin, Limonene, Linalool. Directions Turn the dial to raise the stick and apply a thin layer to your underarms to make the most of 48 hours of guaranteed freshness and an irresistible smell. Safety Warning Anti-perspirant stick. Caution: do not apply to irritated or damaged skin. Stop use if irritation develops. As we are always looking to improve our products, our formulations change from time to time, so please always check the product packaging before usedo not apply to irritated or damaged skin. Stop use if irritation develops. Box Contains 1x Dry Africa Stick Anti-Perspirant Deodorant Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever UK, Unilever House, Leatherhead, Surrey, KT22 7GR. See more
